title: entandrophragma bussei
intro: Entandrophragma bussei, a species of tree in the family Meliaceae, is native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Entandrophragma bussei include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
